title: Guardrail
description: Content policy evaluated before or after upstream calls.

patterns.description: Blocklist patterns. Empty list is legal but pointless — the guardrail will allow every request, same as `enabled: false`.

oneOf.description: AWS Bedrock managed guardrail. The chain builder constructs a `BedrockGuardrail` that calls AWS `ApplyGuardrail` (real SigV4 dispatch) on input and/or output per the row's hook point.

aws_credentials.description: IAM credentials. v1 = static access keys (encrypted).

region.description: AWS region the Bedrock endpoint lives in (e.g. `us-east-1`).

oneOf.description: Azure AI Content Safety Prompt Shield. Detects jailbreak and indirect injection attacks via the `/contentsafety/text:shieldPrompt` API.

api_key.description: Subscription key (`Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key`). Decrypted by cp-api before kine projection; plaintext in memory only, never logged.

endpoint.description: Azure Cognitive Services resource endpoint, e.g. `https://my-resource.cognitiveservices.azure.com`. The DP appends `/contentsafety/text:shieldPrompt?api-version=2024-09-01`.

timeout_ms.description: HTTP call timeout in milliseconds. `0` times out immediately; use a large value for an effectively unlimited timeout.

oneOf.description: Azure AI Content Safety Text Moderation. Category-severity and blocklist moderation via the `/contentsafety/text:analyze` API, on input and/or output, including streaming output.

api_key.description: Subscription key (`Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key`). Plaintext in memory only, never logged.

blocklist_names.description: Azure CS blocklist names to match against.

categories.description: Categories to analyze. Defaults to all four.

endpoint.description: Azure Cognitive Services resource endpoint. The DP appends `/contentsafety/text:analyze?api-version=2024-09-01`.

max_buffer_bytes.description: Max bytes buffered in `buffer_full` mode before `on_buffer_exceeded` applies. Default 262 144.

on_buffer_exceeded.description: `fail_closed` (default) or `fail_open` when the buffer cap is hit.

output_fail_open.description: Fail-open policy for the OUTPUT hook. Defaults `false` (fail-closed) so an Azure outage can't release unscanned model output.

severity_threshold.description: General severity threshold; a category at or above it blocks.

severity_threshold_by_category.description: Per-category threshold overrides (take precedence over the general one).

text_source.description: Input-hook text selection: `concatenate_user_content` (default) or `concatenate_all_content`. Ignored on the output hook.

timeout_ms.description: HTTP call timeout (ms); `fail_open` / `output_fail_open` govern the verdict when it elapses. See the `AzureContentSafetyConfig` note on why `0` means "fire immediately", not "no timeout".

window_overlap_size.description: Chars carried between windows so a span split across a boundary is still caught. Default 256.

window_size.description: Sliding-window size in chars (window mode); cp-api caps it at the 10 000-char Azure limit. Default 10 000.

oneOf.description: Aliyun content-safety guardrail. Risk-level moderation via the `TextModerationPlus` action on `green-cip.<region>.aliyuncs.com`, on input and/or output, including streaming output.

access_key_secret.description: Aliyun AccessKey secret. Decrypted by cp-api before kine projection; plaintext in memory only, never logged. Used to sign the request.

endpoint.description: Explicit endpoint override (full URL, no trailing slash). When set it wins over `region`; used by tests/dev to point at a mock server.

max_buffer_bytes.description: Max bytes buffered in `buffer_full` mode before `on_buffer_exceeded` applies. Default 262 144.

on_buffer_exceeded.description: `fail_closed` (default) or `fail_open` when the buffer cap is hit.

output_fail_open.description: Fail-open policy for the OUTPUT hook. Defaults `false` (fail-closed) so an Aliyun outage can't release unscanned model output.

region.description: Aliyun region the guardrail lives in, e.g. `cn-shanghai`. The DP builds the endpoint `https://green-cip.<region>.aliyuncs.com`.

risk_level_threshold.description: Minimum risk level that triggers a block: `low`, `medium`, or `high` (default). A returned level at or above this blocks.

timeout_ms.description: HTTP call timeout (ms); `fail_open` / `output_fail_open` govern the verdict when it elapses. See the `AzureContentSafetyConfig` note on why `0` means "fire immediately", not "no timeout".

window_overlap_size.description: Chars carried between windows so a span split across a boundary is still caught. Default 128.

window_size.description: Sliding-window size in chars (window mode). Default 2 000 — Aliyun's `llm_response_moderation` per-call content cap.

created_at.description: RFC3339 creation timestamp of the row. When present, the data plane can evaluate guardrail chains oldest-first. Rows without this timestamp sort after rows that have it, with ties broken by resource id.

direction.description: Attachment direction hint: `input`, `output`, or `both`. Stored for compatibility; current hook selection still follows `hook_point`.

enabled.description: When false the chain skips this rule entirely. Lets operators stage a rule (write it, sanity-check it via dry runs, then flip it on) without deleting + recreating.

enforcement_mode.description: How the data plane behaves when this guardrail fires. `monitor` is stored for compatibility but not yet enforced.

fail_open.description: Behavior when a remote-API guardrail (today `kind=bedrock`) can't reach its upstream. `true` lets the request through (recorded in `usage_events.guardrail_bypassed_reason`); `false` blocks with 422. No-op for `kind=keyword`. Defaults `true`.

hook_point.description: Where in the lifecycle this rule runs. Defaults to `both`.

mandatory.description: Whether guardrail evaluation errors should be fatal. Stored for compatibility; current enforcement still follows `fail_open`.

name.description: Operator-facing name; surfaces in metric labels + error reasons.

BedrockAWSCredentials.description: AWS credentials for a Bedrock guardrail.

secret_access_key.description: Decrypted by cp-api before kine projection; plaintext in memory only, never logged. The DP feeds it to the AWS SDK's static credentials provider.

BedrockLatencyMode.description: Per-guardrail latency policy for `kind: "bedrock"`. `serial` waits unconditionally; `timed` aborts at `timeout_ms` and applies the row-level `fail_open` flag.

GuardrailHookPoint.description: What part of the request lifecycle a guardrail inspects.

oneOf.description: Run on the request payload before bridge dispatch.
Run on the upstream response before the cache write + render.
Run on both. Default for keyword blocklists.

KeywordPattern.description: Literal or regular-expression pattern used by a keyword guardrail.
